g.text: This magic-red box will be read on
SweetTalk is a pile of syntactic sugar
based on Smalltalk, with support for
//Try in the console (or click this box):
Multi-Notational Dispatch via Magic Blue Meta-BoxGraph
recv do: x and: y ⟹ send(recv, 'do:', x, 'and:', y)
